Don't judge a [address] by [cover].  
Don't judge a [book] by [title].  

The cost of the brushes is $20. The cost of the canvas is three times the cost of the brushes, so 3 * $20 = $60. The paint costs $8 per liter, and Maria needs at least 5 liters, so 5 * $8 = $40. The total cost of the tools and materials is $20 + $60 + $40 = $120. If Maria sells the painting for $200, her earnings will be $200 - $120 = $80. The answer is $80.
